content_gaps: Detailed cultural symbolism beyond brief mentions of 'freedom' or 'honor', exploring specific meanings (e.g., eagle feathers in Native American traditions).
A focus on the artisan or craftsmanship, detailing the specific silversmithing techniques used to create the intricate feather designs (casting, engraving, finishing).
